betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The takeover of Earth was a slow, gradual one...
And a grisly one...
It all started with parasites, taking over flesh. Corrupting it. Bending it to the Meatball Man's will.
Some of the flesh I am cutting through, it used to be people...
The disgust, the terror, the doubt.
All of this, it was carefully engineered to mess with my head. I have seen the modus operandi of the Meatball Man to know as much.
It is working. Dreadfully well.
And yet, I must not stop...
